name: Keter UI
description: AI-first, RTL-first production UI system for React

packages.@keter-ui/react: Main component library — Button, Input, Modal, Table, Form, and 20+ more
packages.@keter-ui/tokens: Design tokens — colors, typography, spacing, radius, shadows as JS + CSS vars
packages.@keter-ui/core: Core utilities — cn(), variants() system, shared TypeScript types
packages.@keter-ui/rtl: RTL utilities — direction hooks, logical property helpers
packages.@keter-ui/cli: CLI tool — init, add, list commands

prompts.init_nextjs: Install Keter UI in my Next.js project with dark mode and RTL support
prompts.init_vite: Set up Keter UI in a Vite + React project
prompts.dashboard: Create a SaaS dashboard with sidebar, topbar, charts, and data table
prompts.rtl_app: Build an RTL-first application for Hebrew/Arabic users
prompts.form: Create a contact form with validation using Keter UI
prompts.auth: Build a sign-in / sign-up page with Keter UI components

flows.name: New Project Setup
steps: CLI detects framework (Next.js / Vite / Remix / Astro)

flows.name: Add Component
steps: Import in your page: import { Button } from '@keter-ui/react'

flows.name: Enable RTL
steps: All Keter UI components respond automatically to dir attribute
Use Tailwind logical classes: ps-4 pe-4 ms-2 (instead of pl/pr/ml)

flows.name: Dark Mode
steps: All Keter UI components automatically adapt

examples.button:
import { Button } from '@keter-ui/react';
<Button variant="primary" size="lg">Get Started</Button>
examples.form:
import { Form, FormField, FormLabel, FormControl, FormMessage, Input, useForm } from '@keter-ui/react';

const form = useForm();
<Form form={form} onSubmit={console.log}>
  <FormField name="email">
    <FormLabel required>Email</FormLabel>
    <FormControl><Input {...form.register('email')} /></FormControl>
    <FormMessage />
  </FormField>
</Form>
